begining_of_contract.text: วันที่เริ่มสัญญา

root.sql:
SELECT sc_acc_m_account_master.account_id, sc_acc_m_account_master.account_name, sc_lon_m_contract.branch_id , sc_lon_m_contract.begining_of_contract, sc_lon_m_rule.ref_contract_no, ( SELECT rule.loan_type_description FROM sc_lon_m_rule rule WHERE rule.loan_type = sc_lon_m_rule.ref_contract_no ) as loan_type_description,
sc_lon_m_contract.loan_contract_no, sc_lon_m_contract.membership_no, sc_lon_m_ucf_loan_payment_type.loan_payment_type_desc, sc_lon_m_contract.period_payment_amount, sc_lon_m_contract.loan_installment_amount, sc_lon_m_contract.loan_approve_amount, pka_com_function.fp_get_member_name( sc_lon_m_contract.membership_no ) as memname
,( SELECT sum( sc_com_m_receipt_item.item_amount ) FROM sc_com_m_receipt, sc_com_m_receipt_item, sc_com_m_ucf_receipt_item_type WHERE ( sc_com_m_receipt.receipt_no = sc_com_m_receipt_item.receipt_no ) and ( sc_com_m_receipt_item.item_type_id = sc_com_m_ucf_receipt_item_type.item_type_id ) and ( sc_com_m_receipt.loan_contract_no = sc_lon_m_contract.loan_contract_no ) AND ( sc_com_m_receipt.receipt_status = '0' ) ) as sum_item_amount ,sc_lon_m_contract.real_recieve /*ให้เงินสดขึ้นก่อน*/ ,(case when sc_com_m_ucf_money_type.money_type_id = 'CSH' then '_A' else sc_com_m_ucf_money_type.money_type_id end )as money_type_sort ,sc_com_m_ucf_money_type.money_type_id ,sc_com_m_ucf_money_type.money_type_name ,sc_lon_m_loan_request.total_old_loan ,sc_lon_m_loan_request.total_oldint FROM sc_lon_m_rule, sc_acc_m_account_master, sc_lon_m_contract, sc_lon_m_ucf_loan_payment_type , sc_com_m_branch ,sc_lon_m_contract_multi_paid ,sc_com_m_ucf_money_type ,sc_lon_m_loan_request WHERE ( sc_lon_m_rule.account_id = sc_acc_m_account_master.account_id ) and ( sc_lon_m_rule.loan_type = sc_lon_m_contract.loan_type ) and ( sc_lon_m_contract.loan_payment_type_code = sc_lon_m_ucf_loan_payment_type.loan_payment_type_code ) and (sc_lon_m_loan_request.loan_requestment_no = sc_lon_m_contract.loan_requestment_no ) and ( sc_lon_m_contract.create_loan_status = '1' ) and ( sc_com_m_branch.branch_id = sc_lon_m_contract.branch_id ) and sc_lon_m_contract_multi_paid.loan_contract_no = sc_lon_m_contract.loan_contract_no and sc_lon_m_contract_multi_paid.type_pay_money = sc_com_m_ucf_money_type.money_type_id and sc_lon_m_contract_multi_paid.seq_no = 1 and sc_lon_m_rule.invest_status = '0'
/*WHERE*/ --and sc_acc_m_account_master.account_id = '115120' --and sc_com_m_branch.branch_id = '01' --and sc_lon_m_contract.begining_of_contract = '03 พ.ย. 2022'
ORDER BY sc_com_m_branch.branch_id ASC , sc_lon_m_contract.begining_of_contract ASC , money_type_sort ASC , sc_acc_m_account_master.account_id ASC, sc_lon_m_rule.ref_contract_no ASC , sc_lon_m_contract.loan_contract_no ASC

r_tge_loan_create_clr.sql: SELECT sc_com_m_receipt_item.item_type_id, sc_com_m_receipt_item.principal_amount, sc_com_m_receipt_item.interest_amount, sc_com_m_receipt_item.item_amount, sc_com_m_ucf_receipt_item_type.sort_order, sc_com_m_ucf_receipt_item_type.item_type_id, sc_com_m_ucf_receipt_item_type.group_item, decode( sc_com_m_ucf_receipt_item_type.group_item , 'LON' , sc_com_m_receipt.loan_contract_no , sc_com_m_ucf_receipt_item_type.item_type_name ) as description, sc_com_m_receipt_item.loan_type FROM sc_com_m_receipt, sc_com_m_receipt_item, sc_com_m_ucf_receipt_item_type WHERE ( sc_com_m_receipt.receipt_no = sc_com_m_receipt_item.receipt_no ) and ( sc_com_m_receipt_item.item_type_id = sc_com_m_ucf_receipt_item_type.item_type_id ) and ( ( sc_com_m_receipt.loan_contract_no = {0}) AND ( sc_com_m_receipt.receipt_status = '0' ) ) /*WHERE*/ ORDER BY sc_com_m_ucf_receipt_item_type.sort_order ASC, sc_com_m_receipt_item.item_type_id ASC, sc_com_m_receipt_item.loan_type ASC

r_tge_loan_create_clr_sum.sql:
SELECT tab_data.item_type_name ,tab_data.money_type_id ,tab_data.item_type_id ,sum(tab_data.principal_amount) as principal_amount ,sum(tab_data.interest_amount) as interest_amount ,sum(tab_data.item_amount) as item_amount
from ( /* à§Ô¹¡Ùé */ SELECT sc_com_m_receipt.branch_id, sc_com_m_receipt.receipt_date, sc_lon_m_rule.account_id, sc_com_m_ucf_receipt_item_type.group_item , sc_com_m_receipt_item.loan_type as item_type_id , ( select old.loan_type_description from sc_lon_m_rule old where old.loan_type = sc_com_m_receipt_item.loan_type ) as item_type_name , sc_lon_m_contract_multi_paid.type_pay_money as money_type_id , sum( sc_com_m_receipt_item.principal_amount ) as principal_amount , sum( sc_com_m_receipt_item.interest_amount ) as interest_amount , sum( sc_com_m_receipt_item.item_amount ) as item_amount
FROM sc_com_m_receipt, sc_com_m_receipt_item, sc_lon_m_contract, sc_lon_m_rule, sc_com_m_ucf_receipt_item_type ,sc_lon_m_contract_multi_paid WHERE ( sc_com_m_receipt.receipt_no = sc_com_m_receipt_item.receipt_no ) and ( sc_com_m_receipt.loan_contract_no = sc_lon_m_contract.loan_contract_no ) and ( sc_lon_m_contract.loan_type = sc_lon_m_rule.loan_type ) and ( sc_com_m_receipt_item.item_type_id = sc_com_m_ucf_receipt_item_type.item_type_id ) and ( sc_com_m_receipt.receipt_status = '0' ) AND ( sc_lon_m_contract.create_loan_status = '1' ) AND ( sc_com_m_ucf_receipt_item_type.group_item = 'LON' ) and sc_lon_m_contract_multi_paid.loan_contract_no = sc_lon_m_contract.loan_contract_no and sc_lon_m_contract_multi_paid.seq_no = 1 and sc_lon_m_rule.invest_status = '0' and sc_com_m_receipt.receipt_date = {1} and sc_lon_m_contract_multi_paid.type_pay_money = {2}
GROUP BY sc_com_m_receipt.branch_id, sc_com_m_receipt.receipt_date, sc_lon_m_rule.account_id, sc_com_m_ucf_receipt_item_type.group_item , sc_com_m_receipt_item.loan_type, sc_lon_m_contract_multi_paid.type_pay_money union all
SELECT sc_com_m_receipt.branch_id, sc_com_m_receipt.receipt_date, sc_lon_m_rule.account_id, sc_com_m_ucf_receipt_item_type.group_item , sc_com_m_ucf_receipt_item_type.item_type_id as item_type_id , sc_com_m_ucf_receipt_item_type.item_type_name as item_type_name , sc_lon_m_contract_multi_paid.type_pay_money as money_type_id , sum( sc_com_m_receipt_item.principal_amount ) as principal_amount , sum( sc_com_m_receipt_item.interest_amount ) as interest_amount , sum( sc_com_m_receipt_item.item_amount ) as item_amount
FROM sc_com_m_receipt, sc_com_m_receipt_item, sc_lon_m_contract, sc_lon_m_rule, sc_com_m_ucf_receipt_item_type ,sc_lon_m_contract_multi_paid WHERE ( sc_com_m_receipt.receipt_no = sc_com_m_receipt_item.receipt_no ) and ( sc_com_m_receipt.loan_contract_no = sc_lon_m_contract.loan_contract_no ) and ( sc_lon_m_contract.loan_type = sc_lon_m_rule.loan_type ) and ( sc_com_m_receipt_item.item_type_id = sc_com_m_ucf_receipt_item_type.item_type_id ) and ( sc_com_m_receipt.receipt_status = '0' ) AND ( sc_lon_m_contract.create_loan_status = '1' ) AND ( sc_com_m_ucf_receipt_item_type.group_item <> 'LON' ) and sc_lon_m_contract_multi_paid.loan_contract_no = sc_lon_m_contract.loan_contract_no and sc_lon_m_contract_multi_paid.seq_no = 1 and sc_lon_m_rule.invest_status = '0' and sc_com_m_receipt.receipt_date = {1} and sc_lon_m_contract_multi_paid.type_pay_money = {2} GROUP BY sc_com_m_receipt.branch_id, sc_com_m_receipt.receipt_date, sc_lon_m_rule.account_id, sc_com_m_ucf_receipt_item_type.group_item , sc_com_m_ucf_receipt_item_type.item_type_id , sc_com_m_ucf_receipt_item_type.item_type_name , sc_lon_m_contract_multi_paid.type_pay_money
) tab_data , sc_fin_m_close_day ,sc_acc_m_account_master ,sc_com_m_ucf_money_type
where 1=1 and sc_fin_m_close_day.journal_date = tab_data.receipt_date and sc_acc_m_account_master.account_id = tab_data.account_id and sc_fin_m_close_day.branch_fin = {0} and sc_fin_m_close_day.journal_date = {1} and sc_com_m_ucf_money_type.money_type_id = {2} /*WHERE*/ GROUP BY tab_data.group_item ,tab_data.money_type_id ,tab_data.item_type_name ,tab_data.item_type_id order by tab_data.group_item desc ,tab_data.item_type_id

r_tge_loan_create_coll.sql: SELECT sc_lon_m_contract_coll.ref_own_no, sc_lon_m_contract_coll.collateral_description, sc_lon_m_contract_coll.collateral_no FROM sc_lon_m_contract_coll WHERE ( sc_lon_m_contract_coll.loan_contract_no = {0}) AND ( sc_lon_m_contract_coll.status = '0' ) /*WHERE*/ ORDER BY sc_lon_m_contract_coll.collateral_no ASC

r_tge_loan_create_mpaid.sql: SELECT sc_lon_m_contract_multi_paid.seq_no, sc_com_m_ucf_money_type.money_type_id, sc_com_m_ucf_money_type.money_type_name, sc_lon_m_contract_multi_paid.paid_amount, decode( sc_com_m_ucf_money_type.account_type , 'FBK' , pka_com_function.fp_form( sc_lon_m_contract_multi_paid.bank_acc_no ,'XXX-XXXXXX-XXXXXX') , 'DEP' , pka_com_function.fp_form( sc_lon_m_contract_multi_paid.bank_acc_no ,'XX-XXXXXXXXXXXXX') , '' ) as bank_acc_no FROM sc_lon_m_contract_multi_paid, sc_com_m_ucf_money_type WHERE ( sc_lon_m_contract_multi_paid.type_pay_money = sc_com_m_ucf_money_type.money_type_id ) and ( ( sc_lon_m_contract_multi_paid.loan_contract_no = {0}) ) /*WHERE*/ ORDER BY sc_lon_m_contract_multi_paid.seq_no ASC
